# ΏθγΑ Deployment Guide έΑΦ Render (Backend) + Netlify (Frontend)

## Overview

```
MongoDB Atlas  έΗΡέΗΤ  Render (Express API)  έΗΡέΗΤ  Netlify (React)
```

---

## Step 1 έΑΦ MongoDB Atlas (Database)

1. Go to https://cloud.mongodb.com έΗΤ **Create a free account**
2. Click **Build a Database** έΗΤ choose **M0 Free**
3. Pick a cloud region (e.g. AWS / us-east-1)
4. Create a **Database User**:
   - Username: `socialapp`
   - Password: generate a strong one έΑΦ **save it**
5. Under **Network Access** έΗΤ Add IP Address έΗΤ `0.0.0.0/0` (allow all)
6. Click **Connect** έΗΤ **Drivers** έΗΤ copy the URI, looks like:
   ```
   mongodb+srv://socialapp:<password>@cluster0.xxxxx.mongodb.net/?retryWrites=true&w=majority
   ```
7. Replace `<password>` with your actual password and append the DB name:
   ```
   mongodb+srv://socialapp:YOURPASS@cluster0.xxxxx.mongodb.net/socialapp?retryWrites=true&w=majority
   ```
   έεΖ Save this έΑΦ it's your `MONGO_URI`

---

## Step 2 έΑΦ Deploy Backend to Render

1. Push your project to **GitHub** (make sure `backend/` folder is included)
2. Go to https://render.com έΗΤ **New** έΗΤ **Web Service**
3. Connect your GitHub repo
4. Configure:
   | Field | Value |
   |-------|-------|
   | **Name** | `socialapp-backend` |
   | **Root Directory** | `backend` |
   | **Environment** | `Node` |
   | **Build Command** | `npm install` |
   | **Start Command** | `node server.js` |
   | **Plan** | Free |

5. Under **Environment Variables**, add:
   | Key | Value |
   |-----|-------|
   | `MONGO_URI` | your Atlas URI from Step 1 |
   | `JWT_SECRET` | any long random string (32+ chars) e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32` |
   | `JWT_EXPIRE` | `7d` |
   | `NODE_ENV` | `production` |
   | `CLIENT_URL` | `https://your-app.netlify.app` έΗΡ fill after Step 3 |
   | `PORT` | `5000` |

6. Under **Disks** έΗΤ Add Disk:
   | Field | Value |
   |-------|-------|
   | Name | `uploads` |
   | Mount Path | `/opt/render/project/src/uploads` |
   | Size | `1 GB` |

7. Click **Create Web Service**
8. Wait for deploy (~2 min). You'll get a URL like:
   ```
   https://socialapp-backend.onrender.com
   ```
   έεΖ Test it: open `https://socialapp-backend.onrender.com/api/health` έΑΦ should return `{"status":"ok"}`

> έγιΎ╕Π **Render free tier spins down after 15 min of inactivity.** First request after sleep takes ~30s. This is normal on the free plan.

---

## Step 3 έΑΦ Deploy Frontend to Netlify

1. Go to https://netlify.com έΗΤ **Add new site** έΗΤ **Import an existing project**
2. Connect GitHub έΗΤ select your repo
3. Configure:
   | Field | Value |
   |-------|-------|
   | **Base directory** | `frontend` |
   | **Build command** | `npm run build` |
   | **Publish directory** | `frontend/build` |

4. Under **Environment Variables** έΗΤ Add:
   | Key | Value |
   |-----|-------|
   | `REACT_APP_API_URL` | `https://socialapp-backend.onrender.com/api` |

5. Click **Deploy site**
6. You'll get a URL like:
   ```
   https://amazing-name-123.netlify.app
   ```

7. **Go back to Render** έΗΤ your backend service έΗΤ Environment έΗΤ update `CLIENT_URL`:
   ```
   https://amazing-name-123.netlify.app
   ```
   έΗΤ Click **Save Changes** (this triggers a redeploy of the backend)

---

## Step 4 έΑΦ Add Custom Domain (Optional)

### Netlify custom domain:
- Site settings έΗΤ Domain management έΗΤ Add custom domain
- Follow DNS instructions for your registrar

### Render custom domain:
- Service έΗΤ Settings έΗΤ Custom Domains έΗΤ Add

---

## έεΖ Verify Everything Works

1. Open your Netlify URL
2. Register a new account
3. Create a post, upload a photo, send a friend request
4. Check notifications

---

## ΏθΦπ Common Issues

### "Network Error" or CORS error in browser console
- Make sure `CLIENT_URL` in Render env vars **exactly matches** your Netlify URL (no trailing slash)
- Redeploy backend after changing env vars

### Images not loading
- Check that the Render disk is mounted at `/opt/render/project/src/uploads`
- Verify uploads URL: `https://socialapp-backend.onrender.com/uploads/images/filename.jpg`

### "Application error" on first load
- Render free tier cold start έΑΦ wait 30 seconds and refresh

### MongoDB connection failed
- Check Atlas IP whitelist has `0.0.0.0/0`
- Verify password in URI has no special characters unescaped

---

## ΏθΗβ Upgrade Path (When Ready)

| Need | Solution |
|------|----------|
| No cold starts | Render Starter plan ($7/mo) |
| Persistent media storage | Cloudinary (free 25GB) |
| Better DB performance | MongoDB Atlas M2+ |
| Custom domain | Both Netlify & Render support it free |
